subject: [PATCH v4 3/3] cxl/core: use cleanup.h for devm_cxl_add_dax_region

reviews.author: Jonathan Cameron
reviews.summary: Applied the patch with a Reviewed-by tag, indicating it meets kernel coding standards and is suitable for merge.
reviews.raw_body:

2026-03-22.patch_summary: This patch series cleans up the cxl/core code by using cleanup.h for devm_cxl_add_dax_region, which simplifies the function and removes unnecessary goto statements.
